name: Chef Freddy's Rhubarb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rhubarb in the bottom of a 9" x 11" glass cake/baking pan.
2. Mix the gelatin and sugar, pour over the rhubarb, cover with marshmallows, then pour the cake mix on top.
3. Bake at 350°F for 45 to 50 minutes. Cool to room temperature and refrigerate until ready to serve, garnish as desired.
